title: EventUtils
description: Alerting for Event Alerts Minecraft events
body:
# EventUtils
A mod that alerts you when a Minecraft event happens

Possible thanks to the Discord server [EventAlerts](https://discord.gg/a2dUruRWQj)!

## Features:
- In-game notifications for events:
  - Skeppy events
  - Famous events (Karl, MrBeast, etc...)
  - Money events ($5+ USD)
  - Hypixel events
  - Civilization events
  - And more!
- Auto-teleport to events
- Hide players and entities with a keybind
- Confirm disconnect and confirm window close
- Simplified queue message for InvadedLands.net
- DiscordRPC
